CustomField.formula: IF(FIND( "I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )=0, "", IF(FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+5 )=0, RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-2), LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)- FIND("I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb",Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-90) , RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c , FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17 )-2), FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )+17 )-FIND( "I'd be willing to participate in a short interview about my experience with SimilarWeb", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c )-90) ))
CustomField.label: CancellationSurvey 2nd Interview
